title: NetherCrystalSpires
description: Rare crystalline spire structures spawn throughout the Nether containing unique loot and magma cube guardians.
body:
# NetherCrystalSpires

Adds procedurally generated crystal spire structures to Nether wastes and basalt delta biomes. Spires are 15-30 blocks tall, built from blackstone, crying obsidian, and amethyst in jagged formations. Each contains 1-3 hidden loot chests with enchanted golden apples, netherite scraps, and fire resistance potions. Magma cubes spawn as guardians.

**Config:** spawn frequency, biome restrictions, loot tables, guardian difficulty.

**Commands:** `/netherspire locate`, `/netherspire reload`, `/netherspire stats`

**Permissions:** `netherspire.locate`, `netherspire.admin`

Chunk-based generation with minimal server impact. Structures persist and integrate with existing world data.
